articles.author: Leslie Josephs
articles.title: American Airlines CEO lays out his vision to close a more than $3 billion profit gap - CNBC
articles.description: The carrier is working on improving reliability, investing in more premium seats and lounges, and considering Boeing and Airbus for a new wide-body plane order.
articles.content:
Robert Isom, chief executive officer of American Airlines Group Inc., speaks during a Bloomberg Television interview in New York, US, on Wednesday, Dec. 10, 2025.
FORT WORTH, Texas American Airlines… [+13119 chars]

articles.title: US strikes Iran after two American troops killed in Jordan - Financial Times
articles.description: Iran accuses Washington of attacking under-construction nuclear plant and retaliates against countries around region as conflict escalates
